zh.Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾布拉特萊比
zh.Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Picot of Lincoln於1063年出生在英國林可爾史爾布拉特萊比時，他的父親Colswein of Lincoln24歲，母親Muriel de Chappell24歲。他於1085年之前與Beatrice在英國多瑟特馬天斯托結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1125年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾布拉特萊比
zh-hans.Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Picot of Lincoln于1063年出生在英国林可爾史爾布拉特萊比时，他的父亲Colswein of Lincoln24岁，母亲Muriel de Chappell24岁。他于1085年之前与Beatrice在英国多瑟特馬天斯托结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1125年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Picot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Francois, Jacques, Jeanpaul, Luc, Pascal, Yves.  Spanish Esperanza, Aida, Alicia, Ana, Felipe, Luis.
French: from Old French picot ‘pointed object, pickaxe’, a nickname for someone who used such an implement. This surname is also found in Haiti.
Catalan: nickname from Valencian dialect picot ‘(sheep or goat) bell’.

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

variants.name: Picotte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Honore, Andre, Jacques, Serge.
Altered form of French Picot , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Lincoln
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from the name of the city of Lincoln. This is found in the 7th century as Lindum colonia, probably from an Old Welsh word meaning ‘lake’ (compare modern Welsh llyn) + the Latin defining term colonia ‘colony, settlement’. As a given name it was in use in the United States in the 18th century. Rising in popularity in the 19th century, it has no doubt sometimes been bestowed in honour of Abraham Lincoln ( 1809–65 ), 16th president of the United States, who led the Union to victory in the Civil War and enforced the emancipation of slaves.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Picot of Lincoln was born in 1063, in Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Colswein of Lincoln, was 24 and his mother, Muriel de Chappell, was 24. He married Beatrice before 1085, in Martinstown, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1125, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Picot of Lincoln est né en 1063, à Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Colswein of Lincoln, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Muriel de Chappell, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice avant 1085, à Martinstown, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1125, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Picot of Lincoln 1063 in Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Colswein of Lincoln 24 und seine Mutter Muriel de Chappell 24. Er hat vor 1085 in Martinstown, Dorset, England Beatrice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1125 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Picot of Lincoln è nato il nel 1063 nel Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Colswein of Lincoln, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Muriel de Chappell, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice prima del 1085, nel Martinstown, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1125, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Picot of Lincolnが1063年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブラットレビーで生まれた時，父Colswein of Lincolnは24歳，母Muriel de Chappellは24歳であった。1085年以前にイギリスドールセトマルティンストウンでBeatriceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1125年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Picot of Lincoln(이)가 1063년 영국 링코실르 브래틀레비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Colswein of Lincoln(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Muriel de Chappell(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1085년 이전 영국 도르세트 마틴스타운에서 Beatrice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1125년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Picot of Lincoln nasceu em 1063, em Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Colswein of Lincoln, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Muriel de Chappell, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice antes 1085, em Martinstown, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1125, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Picot of Lincoln родился в 1063 г. в местности браттлеби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Colswein of Lincoln было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Muriel de Chappell, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice перед 1085 г. в местности мартинстоун, дорсет, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1125 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Picot of Lincoln nació en 1063, en Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Colswein of Lincoln, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Muriel de Chappell, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Beatrice antes de 1085, en Martinstown, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1125, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
